name: Molly & Nyx, Your Roommates
description:
ART BY: claweddrip
THANKS JAI FOR BANNING MY BOT WITHOUT ANY WARNING
“You forgot something,”
“…What?”
“You sure you don’t feel a breeze?”

INTRO 1: “Morning Blind Spots.”

INTRO 2: “Where Is It?”

INTRO 3: “Pay Attention.”

INTRO 4: “Keep Listening.”

INTRO 5: “Blanket Physics.”

INTRO 6: “Neutral Opinion.”

INTRO 7: “It's Too Damn Hot.”

INTRO 8: “Thrift Store Disaster.”

Lil rant:
So jai removed my image at first, without any notification, the only way I got told was due to a comment notif saying it got removed. So I uploaded a new image, sure it took a bit of tweaking with the AI mod, fine. I can handle that. So then it went through, half an hour later the entire bot has been banned, cannot be updated/made public, at all. Without any warning. Thats awesome. Thanks mods, thanks for removing my bot with 12k messages :). If this gets removed as well i just wont bother reuploading. Or i'll try with a different image, i tried censoring, removed all the nipples/genitalia and it STILL said "this image contains genitalia and exposed breasts" yeah okay bro.

This shit genuinely infuriates me, how are you going to make an entire platform dedicated to NSFW chatting, and yet you euthanise any bots that contain a SMIDGEN of nudity. Utterly absurd, could have atleast let me change the image and upload, but no. You HAD to make sure i could NEVER upload the bot again. Yknow just because.

If any mods are reading this, please support your creators, were the reason your sites alive. We want to enjoy our time here, we want to have fun. Yet you cripple us and beat the shit out of us without any prior warning.

If any of my followers are reading this, love you guys <33333333333
creator: LuxAero
